entities.name: HELIOTHIS ARMIGERA
entities.description: The major pest of chickpeas known as the gram pod borer

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The crop Cicer arietinum L. targeted by Heliothis armigera

entities.name: OLD WORLD
entities.description: The geographical region where Heliothis armigera is a major pest

entities.name: OPEN-FIELD SCREENING
entities.description: A technique used to screen germplasm accessions for pest resistance

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTRE
entities.description: The research center in India where screening was conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the ICRISAT Centre is located

entities.name: GERMPLASM ACCESSIONS
entities.description: Genetic resources screened for resistance to pest damage

entities.name: PEST DAMAGE
entities.description: The damage caused by Heliothis armigera to chickpeas

entities.name: SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The degree to which a genotype is affected by the pest

entities.name: OVIPOSITION
entities.description: The act of laying eggs, which differs among genotypes

entities.name: LARVAL PREFERENCE
entities.description: The preference of larvae for specific plant genotypes

entities.name: RETENTION ON THE PLANT
entities.description: The ability of larvae to remain on the plant

entities.name: ACID EXUDATE
entities.description: The amount of acid exudate on leaves used as a criterion for resistance

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO HELIOTHIS ARMIGERA
entities.description: The ability of chickpeas to withstand attack by the gram pod borer

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: The ability of chickpeas to withstand fusarium wilt
